settings.title: Settings
settings.fileSearchFullDriveWarn: Indexes all drives – may take a long time and use a lot of storage
settings.comingSoon: Will be configurable in a later step.

errors.ollamaDown: Ollama is not reachable. Please start Ollama with 'ollama serve'. [E001]
errors.micUnavailable: No microphone found – text chat available [E002]
errors.wakeModelMissing: Wake word model not found. Please place or train a model. [E003]
errors.backendStarting: Backend is starting… Your security software may be scanning Nox. Please wait a moment. [E004]
errors.backendFailed: Backend could not be started. Please restart Nox or add an exception in your security software. [E005]
errors.wsDisconnected: Backend connection lost. Trying to reconnect… [E006]
errors.wsError: Backend connection error. Please restart Nox. [E007]
errors.voiceTriggerFailed: Voice recording could not be started [E013]
errors.onboardingSaveFailed: Onboarding state could not be saved [E015]
errors.uiCrashHint: The UI detected an unexpected error. You can reload Nox or create a bug report.

onboarding.title: Set up Nox
onboarding.welcomeText: Nox is your local AI assistant. Let's set it up in a few steps.
onboarding.ollamaHint: Please install and start Ollama (ollama serve), then continue.
onboarding.voiceHint: Choose your language and a voice for Nox. The system language was detected automatically.
onboarding.modelHint: Select the Ollama model Nox should use.
onboarding.noModels: No models found. Please pull a model:
onboarding.micTestHint: Select which audio devices Nox should use.
onboarding.micTestNote: You can use Nox via voice or text.
onboarding.micSkip: Text chat is still fully usable. Voice will be disabled.
onboarding.audioDevicesHint: Select which microphone and speakers Nox should use.
onboarding.noAudioDevices: No audio devices found. You can use Nox via text.
onboarding.wakeHint: Say 'Hey Nox' 3 times to test detection.
onboarding.wakeModelHint: The wake word model is built-in. You can skip this step and use Nox via text or mic button.
onboarding.setupCompleteText: Nox is ready. You can now ask questions, use voice, and capture context.
onboarding.analyticsOptIn: Allow anonymous usage analytics (helps improve Nox, no content/IPs)
onboarding.gpuCpuFallback: CUDA not available – Nox runs in CPU mode. Voice will be slower, text chat works normally.
onboarding.downloadComplete: Download complete! Wake word model is ready.
onboarding.wakeWordBuiltin: Wake word model is built-in (Hey Nox). You can test calibration in the next step.
onboarding.recommendedModelDesc: Qwen 3 14B – best balance of quality and speed for Nox.
